# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# kong.yml

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service:8080
    port: 80
    path: /user

  - name: product-service
    host: product-service:8081
    port: 80
    path: /product

routes:
  - name: user-route
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    paths:
      - /user/*
    services:
      - user-service

  - name: product-route
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    paths:
      - /product/*
    services:
      - product-service

upstreams:
  - name: user-upstream
    targets:
      - target: user-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: product-upstream
    targets:
      - target: product-service:8081
        weight: 100

routes:
  - name: user-route
    upstream: user-upstream
    paths:
      - /user/*
    strip_path: true

  - name: product-route
    upstream: product-upstream
    paths:
      - /product/*
    strip_path: true

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: user-service
    route: user-route
    config:
      rate: 100
      period: 1

  - name: ip-restriction
    service: product-service
    route: product-route
    config:
      allowed_ips: ["192.168.1.0/24"]
